description: Your security team has received a new threat intelligence feed. Using Splunk (http://localhost:8000, credentials: admin / SplunkAdmin1!), upload the threat intel CSV file from /home/ga/Documents/threat_intel_feed.csv and create a lookup definition named 'threat_intel_lookup' using 'ip' as the key. Create a saved report named 'Threat_Intel_Enriched_Events' that enriches events from the 'security_logs' index with this threat intelligence data based on source IP addresses.
